demographics.name: Application Comparison
demographics.description: Does another application used at Company have similar capabilities as compared to this application. If yes, please name this other application. If no, enter "N/A".

demographics.name: Application Replacement
demographics.description: Can another application used at Company replace the use of this application. If yes, please name this other application. If no, enter "N/A".

demographics.name: Named Users
demographics.description: Total number of users allowed to use this application (i.e. 1-10, 10-100, 100-1000, Over 1000)

demographics.name: Concurrent Users
demographics.description: Number of users active at any given time for this application during normal business hours

demographics.name: Source
demographics.description: Source of the application (e.g. In-house, custom, COTS, customized etc.)

demographics.name: Category
demographics.description: Function of application, e.g. ERP/Financials, HR Systems, Business Intelligence + Data Warehouse, Middleware, internal/external information portals, Messaging & Collaboration, CRM, etc.

demographics.name: Development Source
demographics.description: Developed locally or centrally

demographics.name: Vendor
demographics.description: Application vendor name

demographics.name: Version
demographics.description: Version of the application

demographics.name: License
demographics.description: Number of COTS Licenses

demographics.name: Package
demographics.description: If the application is COTS-based, what packages were used

demographics.name: Level of customization
demographics.description: If the application was purchased, provide what is the level of customization done for the organization

demographics.name: Refresh Schedule
demographics.description: How often are major enhancements released

demographics.name: Architecture
demographics.description: Web-based, client/server, terminal, etc.

demographics.name: Application Languages
demographics.description: List the language(s) this application uses

demographics.name: Application Size
demographics.description: Application size based on an estimate of the number of other applications that interface/integrate with this application

demographics.name: Named Users
demographics.description: Total number of users allowed to use this application (i.e. 1-10, 10-100, 100-1000, Over 1000)

demographics.name: Concurrent Users
demographics.description: Number of users active at any given time for this application

demographics.name: Application Usage
demographics.description: Frequency of usage of application

demographics.name: Application Support
demographics.description: Number of FTEs supporting the application

demographics.name: Deployment Scope
demographics.description: Deployment scope relates to the given location of the application

demographics.name: Date of initial deployment or purchase
demographics.description: Purchase/deployment date of the application

demographics.name: Total Years of Use
demographics.description: Age of the application

demographics.name: Application Maturity
demographics.description: Percentage of work that is maintenance/enhancement/development for the application

demographics.name: Managed
demographics.description: How is the application managed e.g., Texas Data Center, Amazon web services, etc.

demographics.name: Support Hours
demographics.description: Hours of support e.g. 24x7, Mon-Fri 8-5

demographics.name: Application Size
demographics.description: Roughly rate the size of the application, considering number of screens, interfaces, functions, reports, etc.

demographics.name: Host Name (DNS)/Instance
demographics.description: Host name for each production instance/test/development environments

demographics.name: Environments
demographics.description: Provide the number of development, test/QA, production environments for the application

demographics.name: Production Instances
demographics.description: Number of production instances of the application (including failover instances)

demographics.name: Primary Hardware Platform
demographics.description: Primary hardware platform of the application

demographics.name: Secondary Hardware Platform
demographics.description: Secondary hardware platform of the application

demographics.name: Primary OS
demographics.description: Name and version (ex. Sun v2.6) of the operating system on the primary hardware

demographics.name: Secondary OS
demographics.description: Name and version (ex. Sun v2.6) of the operating system on the secondary hardware

demographics.name: Primary Server ID
demographics.description: Server ID or host name of the primary server where the application resides

demographics.name: Secondary Server ID
demographics.description: Server ID or host name of the secondary server where the application resides

demographics.name: Primary Server Model
demographics.description: Primary server manufacturer & model (e.g. Sun e10000k)

demographics.name: Secondary Server Model
demographics.description: Secondary server manufacturer & model (e.g. Sun e10000k)

demographics.name: Primary Server - Total CPUs
demographics.description: Total number of CPUs on the primary server where the application resides

demographics.name: Secondary Server - Total CPUs
demographics.description: Total number of CPUs on the secondary server where the application resides

demographics.name: Primary Server CPU Speed
demographics.description: Speed (MHZ) of the primary server

demographics.name: Secondary Server CPU Speed
demographics.description: Speed (MHZ) of the secondary server

demographics.name: Primary Server Memory Size
demographics.description: Size of the memory, average utilization and the peak utilization of the primary server

demographics.name: Secondary Server Memory Size
demographics.description: Size of the memory, average utilization and the peak utilization of the secondary server

demographics.name: Storage
demographics.description: General storage device information e.g. storage type (SAN, N/AS, Local), manufacturer and description

demographics.name: Allocated Storage
demographics.description: Size of storage allocated/utilized for the application

demographics.name: Primary Server Location
demographics.description: Physical location where the primary server resides

demographics.name: Secondary Server Location
demographics.description: Physical location where the secondary server resides

demographics.name: Primary Database Vendor
demographics.description: Primary database that the application supports/uses

demographics.name: Primary Database Version
demographics.description: Vendor version

demographics.name: Primary Database Type/Structure
demographics.description: Relational, NoSQL (key-value or document-oriented), etc.

demographics.name: Secondary Databases
demographics.description: Secondary database that the application supports/uses (structure, vendor, version)

demographics.name: Primary Database Host
demographics.description: Primary database host name (if different than the application host)

demographics.name: Secondary Database Hosts
demographics.description: Secondary database host name (if different than the application host)

demographics.name: Primary Database Size (MB)
demographics.description: Current space allocation for the primary database instance

demographics.name: Secondary Database Size (MB)
demographics.description: Current space allocation for the secondary database instance

demographics.name: Middleware
demographics.description: General information of the middleware(s) which are linked to the application e.g. manufacturer, version/release, description and location

demographics.name: Other Software / Tools
demographics.description: Other software and tools such as bolt-ons, EAI, SOA, BI, etc… used by the application

finance.description: Mainframe CPU processing including hardware, software and support expenses

finance.description: Mid-Range hardware, software and support expenses

finance.description: Tape and disk storage expenses including hardware and software

finance.description: Disaster recovery expenses

finance.description: Service desk and data center support expenses

finance.description: Includes infrastructure discretionary expenses

finance.name: Captive Offshore
finance.description: Employees of the organization based outside of the United States

finance.description: External contractors and consultants based outside the United States

finance.description: Includes other application support/maintenance expenses

finance.description: Employees of the organization in the United States

finance.description: Employees of the organization based outside of the United States

finance.description: External contractors and consultants based in the United States

finance.description: External contractors and consultants based outside the United States

finance.name: Other
finance.description: Includes other application development expenses

finance.name: Mainframe
finance.description: Mainframe software licensing and maintenance not included as part of hardware/infrastructure charges

finance.name: Mid-Range
finance.description: Mid-range software licensing and maintenance not included as part of hardware/infrastructure charges

finance.name: Desktop & Laptop
finance.description: Desktop and laptop software and licensing expenses

finance.description: Other software expenses not specifically identified above

finance.description: Any planned upgrade costs of the application
